actions.name: null
actions.description: No operation. Use this when no action should be taken or when unsure.

actions.name: turn_on_light
actions.description: Turn on the light in the specified room.

actions.name: turn_off_light
actions.description: Turn off the light in the specified room.

actions.name: create_memo
actions.description: Create a memo addressed from origin to destination. Example: create_memo origin='Daniel' destination='Teresa' title='Reminder' content='Buy milk'.

actions.name: list_memos
actions.description: List memos, optionally filtered by origin/destination/state. Example: list_memos destination='Teresa' limit=10.

actions.name: create_list
actions.description: Create a named list for a destination with optional initial items. Example: create_list origin='Daniel' destination='Teresa' title='Shopping' items=['eggs','milk'].

actions.name: list_lists
actions.description: List existing lists, optionally filtered by origin/destination/title. Example: list_lists destination='Teresa'.

actions.name: add_list_item
actions.description: Add a single item to a list. Specify `list_id` or identify the list by origin/destination/title. Example: add_list_item list_id=123 item_text='bread'.

actions.name: get_lists_for_user
actions.description: Return lists for a given destination user. Example: get_lists_for_user destination='Teresa'.

actions.name: get_list
actions.description: Return a list and its items by `list_id`. Example: get_list list_id=123.
